productDisplayName: Red Tape Brown Formal Men's Shoe
description: Take formal dressing to the next level with this leather shoe from red tape. The full grain leather lends it a natural finish enhancing your style quotient immensely, making formal dressing all the more fun.UpperFull-grain leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPointed toe design for added styleLeather inner lining for ultimate breathabilityMidsoleErgonomically padded leather footbed with perforations for sweat-free comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a wooden-texture and has horizontal grooves on the back heel for absolute grip and traction shoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
